data.html_notes: we have rumble specific code on userid/jwt check at WDK layer, we want to move this code to rumble layer so that the wdk layer is cleaner for us internally and also to be open sourced in the future https://github.com/tetherto/rumble-app-node/pull/181 https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-app-node/pull/91
data.name: Refactoring - Move JWT userId request param fallback to rumble layer
data.notes:
we have rumble specific code on userid/jwt check at WDK layer, we want to move this code to rumble layer so that the wdk layer is cleaner for us internally and also to be open sourced in the future

https://github.com/tetherto/rumble-app-node/pull/181
https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-app-node/pull/91
